arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag reacts to prospect of being sacked if next two Man Utd games go badly
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag is under pressure at Manchester United after a poor start to the season, but the Dutchman has claimed he is not nervous about his future at the club

arts.ttl: Manchester United's senior stars making feelings clear on Erik ten Hag sack fears
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag's future has come under question at Manchester United with the Dutchman fighting for his job at Old Trafford but it appears he still has the support of the dressing room

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag has made the perfect Man United request - but Ineos must not grant it
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag has a tendency to say all the right things but it will be actions rather than words that saves his job

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag receives double injury boost for huge Porto clash as Man United squad revealed
arts.sum: United held an open training session on Wednesday ahead of their trip to Porto in the Europa League

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag: I have not lost Man Utd dressing room
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag insists that he has not lost the Old Trafford dressing room amidst the crisis at the club. There are reports Ten Hag will be axed if United don’t get positive results in the next two games against Porto and Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Man United stars hung out to dry as Bruno Fernandes one of two praised by Benni McCarthy
arts.sum: Benni McCarthy has taken a swipe at Manchester United following his surprise exit in the summer, claiming that all but two members of Erik ten Hag's squad are "giving everything"

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag knows what his players truly feel about him after “disgusting” Tottenham defeat
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag cut a lonely figure on the Old Trafford touchline at the weekend, as his Man United side were battered by Tottenham Hotspur. Former Red Devil, Gary Neville, called the performance “disgusting” and many other things on his Gary Neville podcast, recorded directly after the match when he was clearly still seething at […] The post Erik ten Hag knows what his players truly feel about him after “disgusting” Tottenham defeat appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson and Ole Gunnar Solskjaer disagree on next Man Utd manager
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag's position as Manchester United manager is becoming increasingly precarious with two former bosses eyeing different personnel to replace the Dutchman

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag lifts lid on Sir Jim Ratcliffe chats after Man United's Tottenham horror show
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag is under increasing pressure at Manchester United after a poor start to the season, and the Dutchman has now revealed he's held fresh discussions with co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson chooses Man Utd’s Ten Hag replacement
arts.sum: Ten Hag is at risk of the sack after the 3-0 home defeat to Tottenham on Sunday, with reports the Dutchman will be axed if United don’t get positive results in the next two games against Porto and Aston Villa. Manchester United icon Sir Alex Ferguson has advised his former club to appoint Max Allegri as Erik ten Hag’s successor as coach.
